_comment: Active PR Board. state: draft | open | merged | blocked | queued | closed. ci: green | pending | failing | none | unknown. mergeReadiness: free text. url optional. Cross-repo PRs are labeled 'reported' because this dashboard cannot verify them from the devbiz session.

items.title: Mission Control v1 — gated /lab/mission-control dashboard
items.mergeReadiness: Merged (PR #25). Static, additive, zero-build. Cloudflare Access for /lab/* remains the owner gate.

items.title: Plant review panel
items.mergeReadiness: Reported pending CI/visual review. Not verifiable from devbiz — treat as reported.

items.title: Private Studio Lab tool hub + Aether Wing placeholder (Cloudflare Access-gated)
items.mergeReadiness: Merged. Access config is the remaining owner gate.

items.title: Live AI concierge widget + Doctrine page (UI/content; backend extracted)
items.ownerAction: Decide: rebase onto main + merge keyless UI, or hold
items.mergeReadiness: Held as draft; backend + deploy-arch require explicit OWNER-OK. Ships keyless demo.

items.title: docs: Code Lens — Phase 1 spec
items.ownerAction: Greenlight Phase 2 scaffold (separate PR) when ready
items.mergeReadiness: Merged 2026-06-20 (DBZ-018). Phase 2 = deterministic read-only scaffold opens as the next separate PR.

items.title: docs: reconcile build ledger (close out DBZ-013)
items.mergeReadiness: Merged 2026-06-20 (DBZ-017). Ledger row IDs renumbered on merge (DBZ-014 was already taken → DBZ-017/DBZ-018).
